name: facebook-marketing
description: Reads Facebook Marketing ad accounts, campaigns, ads, ad sets, ad creatives, custom audiences, and performance insights, and creates/updates campaigns and ad sets, through the Graph API.

risk.read: external Facebook Graph API read of ad account, campaign, ad, ad set, ad creative, custom audience, and insights (performance metrics) data
risk.write: external mutation of a live Facebook ad account; creating/updating campaigns and ad sets can incur real ad spend once ads are attached and the campaign/ad set is active
risk.approval: writes require approval; reads are unrestricted
